latest_feature.name: Odoo Source Map — automatic batched deep scan
latest_feature.summary: Replaced the single synchronous Odoo Source Map scan (could exceed the 120s reverse-proxy timeout) with a background, resumable, batched scan session: per-source isolation, search_count for exact totals, bounded offset-paged sample (never a full-table read), strict per-batch/per-source timeouts, retry/resume, and DB-persisted progress polled by the UI.
review_fixes: hold a strong reference to the background scan asyncio.Task (asyncio keeps only weak refs) — apps/edr/app.py _SCAN_TASKS
widen the UI live-progress poll window 5m -> 15m for slow degraded scans
latest_feature.not_changed: report generation, AI providers, SharePoint, Email, generic Odoo source registry

latest_local_validation.context: Current origin/main commit 513314df977fa7d7acd3f8501313c22b5a6fcd4f was deployed to the NOT_LIVE app environment with docker compose up -d --build app. n8n workflows, connector settings, secrets, production_status, and must_not_deploy were not changed. Runtime app image digest sha256:c6571d0f23051eb7129507c475c7e18c2dfe3a79cc1ad002c0dcc363e5051695 is healthy. Local and public /healthz returned HTTP 200. Runtime source contains REPORT_SYNC_TIMEOUT_S and asyncio.wait_for. In-container timeout guard test passed. Query Composer/API attempts for PRJ-001 returned fast JSON HTTP 401 because no real bearer token was available and production mode rejects dev-bypass headers, so authenticated long-running workflow behavior remains not verified.
